item.text: I’ll play Blast and use the two available attackers to remove P2’s full-health center raider, then advance and recruit to keep the pressure line full.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-023.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-023\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-023.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-023.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-023\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-023.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, removed P2'"'s full-health center raider with two capped attacks, advanced reinforcements, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use Blast damage across two attacks to secure a full raider kill, keep the center reinforced, and continue turning supply into immediate board pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json"'

cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-023.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-023\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-023.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-023.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-023\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-021-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-019-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-023.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, removed P2'"'s full-health center raider with two capped attacks, advanced reinforcements, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use Blast damage across two attacks to secure a full raider kill, keep the center reinforced, and continue turning supply into immediate board pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-023.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-023.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-023`.

Deck line: played `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `5` money and `2` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(6,5)` and `(8,3)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-023-1` at `(10,1)`, and removed `P2-raider-turn-018-1` with two capped Blast attacks.

Rationale: this converts Blast into a full raider kill, keeps P1 reinforced in the center, and continues the rush by recruiting another attacker. Strict validation passed.
